notes: no sound. the game runs well otherwise. also tried with 4.14-GE-1 and all the older versions of Proton. rated bronze because not having sound is an issue preventing me from playing comfortably. with sound, this would be platinum.
title: Megaton Rainfall

notes:
Currently Megaton Rainfall runs flawlessly sans audio, but it can be easily fixed by doing the following: 

1) download this file from Openal: https://kcat.strangesoft.net/openal-binaries/openal-soft-1.19.1-bin.zip

2) From that file extract the file soft_oal.dll from /bin/Win32 of the downloaded archive.

3) copy the file to your ~/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/common/Megaton Rainfall/ folder.

4) rename OpenAL32.dll to OpenAL32.bak

5) Rename soft_oal.dll to OpenAL32.dll

6) Start game and destroy the aliens with full audio enabled!
title: Megaton Rainfall

notes: There is no audio due to an old OpenAL32.DLL. Once it's replaced with a good one then the sound will work.
title: Megaton Rainfall
